Name: PMWeb Accelerator
Description: Capital project and cost data into Snowflake in days, not months. Pre-built pipelines, validated schemas, analytics-ready output.
Buyer Persona: VP IT / Data  ·  Director of Project Controls
Challenge Title: PMWeb data is trapped in silos
Problem Quote Text: Capital project data locked in PMWeb never makes it into the enterprise data warehouse — so project controls, finance, and executives are always working from different numbers.
Problem Quote Cite: — Common client feedback, Capital Projects practice
Solution Lead: The PMWeb Data Extract Accelerator is a complete, configurable integration framework — not a one-time script. It provides every layer needed to move PMWeb data reliably into Snowflake or other cloud data warehouses.

Name: JDE Accelerator
Description: JD Edwards ERP data into Snowflake without ETL complexity. Replaces Crystal Reports. Julian date normalisation built in.
Challenge Title: JDE data is locked in a legacy black box
Solution Lead: The JDE Data Extract Accelerator handles every idiosyncrasy of JDE's data model — Julian dates, Business View structures, module-level configuration — so your team gets clean, analytics-ready data without the archaeology.

Name: OneStream Accelerator
Description: Financial planning data — actuals, budgets, forecasts — into Snowflake with full entity hierarchy and audit trail.
Challenge Title: Financial truth lives in OneStream. Analytics can't reach it.
Solution Lead: The OneStream Data Extract Accelerator connects OneStream to Snowflake with full entity hierarchy preservation, complete audit trail, and automatic refresh — making financial planning data a first-class citizen in your enterprise analytics stack.

Name: VTS Accelerator
Description: Leasing and asset data from VTS unified with your full stack — one source of truth for portfolio analytics.
Buyer Persona: VP Asset Management  ·  Director of Leasing
Challenge Title: VTS knows your portfolio. Your data stack doesn't.
Solution Lead: The VTS Data Extract Accelerator extracts the full VTS data model — deals, tenants, leases, properties, and contacts — into Snowflake, where it joins with financial, project, and lease data to create the portfolio analytics view that asset managers have always wanted.

Name: M-Files Accelerator
Description: Document metadata, workflow states, and version history from M-Files into Snowflake. The bridge to LeaseIQ for M-Files clients.
Challenge Title: Your documents are managed. Your document data is not.
Solution Lead: The M-Files Intelligence Accelerator extracts the full richness of M-Files — metadata, workflow states, version history, permissions, and document content — into Snowflake, where it becomes queryable, governable, and AI-ready.

Name: LeaseIQ
Description: AI lease abstraction and obligation tracking. Every clause extracted, every deadline surfaced, every answer sourced to the exact page.
Buyer Persona: VP Real Estate  ·  General Counsel  ·  Head of Leasing
Challenge Title: Your leases are full of risk. Nobody has read them all.
Solution Lead: LeaseIQ is a Snowflake-native AI application that ingests your lease portfolio, extracts every critical clause, and makes your leases searchable, queryable, and auditable in natural language — without a single paralegal touching a document.

Name: MunicipalIQ
Description: Pre-screens permit applications against bylaws, OCP, and design guidelines before submission. Serves developers and municipalities.
Challenge Title: Permit applications fail for reasons that were always in the bylaw.
Solution Lead: MunicipalIQ ingests the full regulatory document corpus — bylaws, OCP, design guidelines, building codes — and screens every permit application before submission, surfacing compliance gaps, missing requirements, and design guideline conflicts before they become rejection reasons.

Name: Store IQ
Description: Real-time 3D and 2D planogram creation. Video-parsed compliance review against brand standards. Store managers conduct monthly reviews with existing staff — no oversight team required.
Buyer Persona: VP Retail Operations  ·  District Manager  ·  Store Manager

Name: AdIQ
Description: Video ad intelligence platform. Frame-by-frame cross-cultural scoring, expressiveness modelling, AI storyboard creator grounded in historical performance, and competitive intelligence.
Buyer Persona: VP Marketing  ·  Creative Director  ·  Media Planner

Name: Call Centre IQ
Description: Contact centre voice and transcript analysis. Performance coaching, sentiment tracking, compliance monitoring, and operational intelligence. Reference clients: Scene+ and CI Investments.
Buyer Persona: VP Customer Experience  ·  Contact Centre Manager  ·  COO
